overview.description: The Innovator U.S. Equity Accelerated 9 Buffer ETF - July (XBJL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund aims for 2x the price return of the SPDR S&P 500 ETF (SPY), subject to an upside return cap and downside buffer over a one-year outcome period. XBJL was launched on Jul 1, 2021 and is issued by Innovator.
